result.stdout:
Description:
  Tool to convert Dotnet-Formats to Gitlab code quality

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  roslynator <source> <target> <root>                     Convert Roslynator file to Code Quality issue [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]
  sarif <source> <target> <root>                          Convert Sarif files to Code Quality issue [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]
  merge <target> <sources>                                Merge multiple code quality files into one
  transform <sarifGlob> <roslynatorGlob> <target> <root>  Transforms files from a glob mapping and merges them to one file [sarifGlob: **/*.sarif.json, roslynatorGlob: **/roslynator.xml, root: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]

commands.payload:
Description:
  Tool to convert Dotnet-Formats to Gitlab code quality

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  roslynator <source> <target> <root>                     Convert Roslynator file to Code Quality issue [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]
  sarif <source> <target> <root>                          Convert Sarif files to Code Quality issue [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]
  merge <target> <sources>                                Merge multiple code quality files into one
  transform <sarifGlob> <roslynatorGlob> <target> <root>  Transforms files from a glob mapping and merges them to one file [sarifGlob: **/*.sarif.json, roslynatorGlob: **/roslynator.xml, root: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Merge multiple code quality files into one

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab merge [<target> [<sources>...]] [options]

Arguments:
  <target>   The target file
  <sources>  The files to merge

Options:
  --all_major     if true all info and minor issues are promoted to major for Gitlab
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Merge multiple code quality files into one

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab merge [<target> [<sources>...]] [options]

Arguments:
  <target>   The target file
  <sources>  The files to merge

Options:
  --all_major     if true all info and minor issues are promoted to major for Gitlab
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Convert Roslynator file to Code Quality issue

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab roslynator [<source> [<target> [<root>]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  The file to convert
  <target>  The target file
  <root>    The name root of the repository. Gitlab requires Code Quality issues to contain paths relative to the repository, but the tools report them as absolute file paths. Everything given in with this option will be removed. E.g. root is 'c:/dev' and the file name is something like 'c:/dev/myrepo/file.cs' it will transformed to 'myrepo/file.cs'. Can often be omitted.  [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Convert Sarif files to Code Quality issue

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab sarif [<source> [<target> [<root>]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  The file to convert
  <target>  The target file
  <root>    The name root of the repository. Gitlab requires Code Quality issues to contain paths relative to the repository, but the tools report them as absolute file paths. Everything given in with this option will be removed. E.g. root is 'c:/dev' and the file name is something like 'c:/dev/myrepo/file.cs' it will transformed to 'myrepo/file.cs'. Can often be omitted.  [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Transforms files from a glob mapping and merges them to one file

Usage:
  CodeQualityToGitlab transform [<sarifGlob> [<roslynatorGlob> [<target> [<root>]]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <sarifGlob>       Glob pattern for the sarif files [default: **/*.sarif.json]
  <roslynatorGlob>  Glob pattern for the roslynator files [default: **/roslynator.xml]
  <target>          The target file
  <root>            The name root of the repository. Gitlab requires Code Quality issues to contain paths relative to the repository, but the tools report them as absolute file paths. Everything given in with this option will be removed. E.g. root is 'c:/dev' and the file name is something like 'c:/dev/myrepo/file.cs' it will transformed to 'myrepo/file.cs'. Can often be omitted.  [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]

Options:
  --all_major     if true all info and minor issues are promoted to major for Gitlab
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

  <roslynatorGlob>  Glob pattern for the roslynator files [default: **/roslynator.xml]
  <target>          The target file
  <root>            The name root of the repository. Gitlab requires Code Quality issues to contain paths relative to the repository, but the tools report them as absolute file paths. Everything given in with this option will be removed. E.g. root is 'c:/dev' and the file name is something like 'c:/dev/myrepo/file.cs' it will transformed to 'myrepo/file.cs'. Can often be omitted.  [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-codequalitytogitlab-2.0.0-d82b7165c6fc45879c8675d875d2f995]

Options:
  --all_major     if true all info and minor issues are promoted to major for Gitlab
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
